scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=ptime:20 m=image 59718 udptl t38 a=T38FaxVersion:0 a=T38FaxMaxBuffer:1100 a=T38FaxMaxDatagram:612 a=T38MaxBitRate:14400 a=T38FaxRateManagement:transferredTCF a=T38FaxUdpEC:t38UDPRedundancy a=inactive

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655767 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=ptime:20 m=image 59718 udptl t38 a=T38FaxVersion:0 a=T38FaxMaxBuffer:1100 a=T38FaxMaxDatagram:612 a=T38MaxBitRate:14400 a=T38FaxRateManagement:transferredTCF a=T38FaxUdpEC:t38UDPRedundancy a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] From: [$Bye1From] To: [$Bye1To] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$Bye1Cseq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
